Zodiac (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,080,084Details
International Box Office $49,947,854
Worldwide Box Office $83,027,938
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,409,139
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $366,322
Total $21,775,461
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,395,610 (40.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$85,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,362 opening theaters/2,379 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,505,498

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 2nd, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: August 15th, 2007 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: July 24th, 2007 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for some strong killings, language, drug material and brief sexual images.
Running Time: 158 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Watching a Fictionalized Version of Yourself
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Investigative Journalist, Police Detective, Serial Killer
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Time period setting: 1960s, 1970s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Phoenix Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
